images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, standing under a dreamy canopy of cherry blossom trees. She wears a trendy, form-fitting crop top that highlights her slim waist and exposed midriff, the fabric textured with a futuristic sheen that hints at a cyberpunk edge, paired with a high-waisted skirt. Her straight black silky hair cascades over her shoulders, framing a face with flawless realistic skin texture, visible pores, and faint vellus hair. She offers a seductive smile to the camera, her large expressive eyes locking onto the lens with a whimsical and magical allure. The scene is illuminated by bright, clear cyberpunk dual-tone lighting, casting vibrant neon hues across her features without heavy shadows, yet the entire image is rendered in a classic black and white portrait grade. The background is a soft bokeh of falling petals and urban scenery, shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, utilizing depth of field, ray tracing, and global illumination for maximum clarity.8k photo, Large breasts
